mapper.update: create table if not exists scores ( createAt text primary key not null, scoreId integer not null, beatmapId integer not null, accuracy float not null, mods integer not null, userId integer not null, websiteScoreId integer not null )
create table if not exists score_histories ( id integer primary key, beatmapId integer not null, activeAnalyzeId integer not null, )

create table if not exists analyze ( id integer primary key, historyId integer not null, prevAnalyzeId integer not null, analyzeTime text not null, bestScoreId integer not null, valid boolean not null )
mapper.select: select * from scores where beatmapId = #{id} order by createAt desc
mapper.insert: insert into scores (createAt, scoreId, accuracy, mods, userId, websiteScoreId) values(#{createAt}, #{scoreId}, #{accuracy}, #{mods}, #{userId}, #{websiteScoreId})
insert or replace into score_histories (id, beatmapId, activeAnalyzeId) values(#{id}, #{beatmapId}, #{activeAnalyzeId})
insert or replace into analyze (id, historyId, prevAnalyzeId, analyzeTime, bestScoreId, valid) values(#{id}, #{historyId}, #{prevAnalyzeId}, #{analyzeTime}, #{bestScoreId}, #{valid})
